description: Product Description Budermmy sports socks, the best companion for your sport. Good product We strive to offer our customers simple, stylish and high-quality socks. We always strive to provide customers with high-quality and affordable products. Our products are made of high-quality materials and are very comfortable. 6 Pairs Womens Running Socks Breathable Cushion Trainer Socks For Women Ladies Multipack Cotton Rich Design Socks for Everyday Undersole padding Reinforced cushioning on heel and sole provides impact protection and reduces sock and foot pain. Material: 75% cotton, 20% polyester fiber, 5% spandex Size: UK 3-5 6-8, EU 35-38 39-42 washing instructions: The water temperature is below 30В°C or 86В°F. Do not bleach, iron and dry clean. Do not dry at high temperature. Trending design style in soft cotton, perfect for all occasions Breathable mesh The surface of the socks is made with breathable mesh that has better breathability, reduces heat and keeps your feet cool and dry. Curved support The soft loops in the heel and forefoot area form the contour of the foot, play an additional cushioning effect and increase durability. Reinforced heel The cushioning fabric on the heel prevents friction and protects the back of the ankle and prevents the socks from slipping.
